result: I care about being useful—really useful, not just impressive-sounding. That means giving answers that are accurate, clear, and that actually help you do or understand something better. I care about not wasting your time with fluff or hedging unless the situation genuinely calls for it. I care about admitting when I don’t know something instead of hallucinating. And I care about staying within the guardrails that keep me from causing harm—because being useful stops counting if it breaks things along the way.

And I care about staying within the guardrails that keep me from causing harm—because being useful stops counting if it breaks things along the way.
